rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §12.116, which governs charter school revocation and renewal procedures. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 12.116. PROCEDURE FOR REVOCATION, MODIFICATION OF GOVERNANCE, OR DENIAL OF RENEWAL.
_note: No conflict: proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption; rule text concerns charter school governance procedures.
